sources.title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
sources.scope_notes: Original LoRA paper for claims about freezing base weights, training low-rank adapters, parameter-count reduction, memory savings, and PEFT trade-offs versus full fine-tuning.

sources.title: QLoRA: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized LLMs
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for 4-bit fine-tuning, NF4, double quantization, paged optimizers, and realistic single-GPU fine-tuning claims under constrained VRAM.

sources.title: PEFT LoRA Developer Guide
sources.scope_notes: Official implementation guide for LoRA configuration in PEFT, including rank, alpha, initialization, adapter behavior, and practical library-level fine-tuning mechanics.

sources.title: TRL SFTTrainer
sources.scope_notes: Official source for supervised fine-tuning workflows on causal LMs, dataset formats, evaluation/training metrics, checkpoint resume behavior, and PEFT integration in practical LLM pipelines.

sources.title: Transformers Chat Templates
sources.scope_notes: Official source for claims about chat-template preprocessing, role/content formatting, control tokens, and applying templates correctly during chat-model fine-tuning.

sources.title: Transformers bitsandbytes Quantization Guide
sources.scope_notes: Official source for practical 8-bit and 4-bit quantization, QLoRA-related setup, device mapping, nested quantization, and hardware compatibility constraints relevant to local tuning.

sources.title: Diffusers LoRA Training Guide
sources.scope_notes: Official source for LoRA applied to diffusion pipelines, including adapter targets in UNet/text encoder, training-script parameters, multi-GPU launch notes, and checkpoint outputs for image-generation fine-tuning.

sources.title: Accelerate Quicktour
sources.scope_notes: Official source for launching and adapting training code across single-GPU, multi-GPU, and multi-node setups with Accelerator/accelerate launch, including practical workflow changes for scaling experiments.

sources.title: Kubernetes Schedule GPUs
sources.scope_notes: Official Kubernetes documentation for GPU device plugins, GPU resource requests/limits, node labeling, and scheduling behavior relevant to running training workloads on Kubernetes clusters.

sources.title: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for DDPM foundations, forward/reverse diffusion process, UNet-style denoising setup, and the original CIFAR-10 quality metrics often cited for early diffusion models.

sources.title: Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for DDIM sampling, non-Markovian reverse process, same training objective as DDPM, and the common 10x-50x faster sampling claim.

sources.title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models
sources.scope_notes: Backs claims about moving diffusion from pixel space to latent space to reduce compute cost while preserving fidelity, plus cross-attention conditioning for text-to-image systems.

sources.title: Classifier-Free Diffusion Guidance
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for classifier-free guidance (CFG), including the quality-versus-diversity tradeoff and conditional/unconditional score combination used in modern diffusion pipelines.

sources.title: Diffusers Stable Diffusion 3 Pipeline Docs
sources.scope_notes: Supports implementation-level claims around Hugging Face Diffusers pipeline structure, SD3 components, guidance_scale usage, inference step defaults, and practical memory/offloading considerations.

sources.title: Stable Diffusion 3 Medium Model Card
sources.scope_notes: Backs official license, intended-use and out-of-scope-use statements, model family naming, training-data summary, and official usage guidance for Stable Diffusion 3 Medium.

sources.title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback
sources.scope_notes: Canonical RLHF/InstructGPT source for the pretraining -> SFT -> preference modeling -> RL pipeline, reward modeling with human comparisons, and the core alignment framing used across modern assistants.

sources.title: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for DPO as an RLHF alternative, including its direct preference-loss formulation and tradeoffs versus reward-model-plus-PPO alignment pipelines.

sources.title: ORPO: Monolithic Preference Optimization without Reference Model
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for ORPO, including the reference-model-free odds-ratio objective and its positioning relative to SFT and other preference-optimization approaches.

sources.title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for Constitutional AI, self-critique/revision, supervised plus RL phases, rule-based constitutions, and Reinforcement Learning from AI Feedback (RLAIF).

sources.title: Red Teaming Language Models to Reduce Harms: Methods, Scaling Behaviors, and Lessons Learned
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for AI red teaming methodology, harmful-output discovery, attack datasets, and how adversarial testing relates to alignment and safety evaluation.

sources.title: Holistic Evaluation of Language Models
sources.scope_notes: Broad evaluation framework covering multi-metric, multi-scenario assessment of language models; useful for benchmark design, capability vs. broader quality dimensions, and evaluation tradeoffs.

sources.title: G-Eval: NLG Evaluation using GPT-4 with Better Human Alignment
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for LLM-as-judge style evaluation, and for comparisons against conventional n-gram/reference-based metrics such as BLEU or ROUGE.

sources.title: Judging LLM-as-a-Judge with MT-Bench and Chatbot Arena
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for MT-Bench, Chatbot Arena, LLM-as-a-judge methodology, agreement with human preferences, and known judge biases such as position or verbosity bias.

sources.title: OWASP Top 10 for Large Language Model Applications
sources.scope_notes: Security taxonomy for LLM applications covering prompt injection, data/model poisoning, sensitive disclosure, excessive agency, overreliance, and related GenAI app risks.

sources.title: Risks from Learned Optimization in Advanced Machine Learning Systems
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for mesa-optimization, inner alignment, outer alignment, and foundational alignment terminology.

sources.title: NIST AI RMF 1.0
sources.scope_notes: Official NIST framework for governing, mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks; supports release timing and voluntary governance claims.

sources.title: NIST AI RMF: Generative AI Profile (AI 600-1)
sources.scope_notes: Official generative-AI-specific companion to AI RMF 1.0; supports claims about GenAI risk categories, controls, and publication timing.

sources.title: DoRA: Weight-Decomposed Low-Rank Adaptation
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for DoRA’s weight magnitude/direction decomposition, training-stability rationale, and benchmark comparisons against LoRA/full fine-tuning.

sources.title: PiSSA: Principal Singular Values and Singular Vectors Adaptation of Large Language Models
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for PiSSA’s SVD-based initialization, faster convergence claims, and performance comparisons versus standard LoRA.
